description: 7 UI tasks for evaluating agent-driven UI generation paradigms

tasks.name: task-list
tasks.title: Render Task List
tasks.description: Display a list of 10 TODO items showing title, status (done/pending), priority, and due date

tasks.name: task-detail
tasks.title: Show Task Detail
tasks.description: Display a single task with all fields: title, description, status, priority, due date, tags, created/updated timestamps

tasks.name: create-task
tasks.title: Create Task Form
tasks.description: Render a form to create a new task with fields: title (required), description (textarea), priority (select: low/medium/high), due date (date picker)

tasks.name: incremental-update
tasks.title: Incremental Data Update
tasks.description: Starting from T1 (10 items), simulate: (a) new task added, (b) existing task marked done. Measure update cost vs full re-render

tasks.name: view-switching
tasks.title: Toggle View Layout
tasks.description: Switch the same 10-item dataset between three layouts: list view, grid/card view, table view

tasks.name: search-filter
tasks.title: Search and Filter
tasks.description: Add search box (text filter on title) and status filter (all/pending/done) to the task list

tasks.name: multi-step-wizard
tasks.title: Multi-step Project Creation
tasks.description: Three-step wizard: (1) Enter project name + description, (2) Select members from list, (3) Review + confirm. Each step validates before proceeding

tasks.name: dashboard
tasks.title: Multi-panel Dashboard
tasks.description: Composite view with: (1) stats summary cards (total/completed/pending/overdue), (2) recent activity feed, (3) priority distribution chart data, (4) task list. Multiple AFS paths mounted into one UI.

tasks.name: data-table-crud
tasks.title: Interactive Data Table
tasks.description: Full-featured table with: sortable columns, pagination (5 per page), inline edit mode, row selection, bulk status change action. Common SE benchmark scenario.

tasks.name: chat-feed
tasks.title: Real-time Chat Feed
tasks.description: Chat message list with: sender avatars, timestamps, message grouping by date, new message input, real-time append (incremental update). Tests streaming/push advantage of AFS-UI.
